loginDescription: Sign in to your account to continue
sessionExpiredDescription: Your session has expired. Please log in again to continue.
passkeysDescription: Manage your passkeys for passwordless sign-in
passkeyNameHint: Helps you identify this passkey later, especially if you add multiple devices. e.g. “Office laptop”, “iPhone Face ID”, “YubiKey”
removePasskeyConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this passkey?
nameTooLong: Passkey name must be 100 characters or less
passkeyPasswordRequired: Password is required to add a passkey
passkeyNotAvailable: No passkey found. Try signing in with your password.
